examples: The men who wield the power are certainly backing him to the hilt.
My students quickly see that the simplest way parents can elicit cooperation from children is to wield power tools.
He who knows only how to wield a pen usually feels quite helpless in the face of practical problems.
Inevitably, this sparks complaints that Goldman holds too much power--and is too quick to wield it.
America would have by far the most influence, if it chose to wield it.
